columns.name: RefundJoinFee
columns.description: 入會退會(依比例退還入會費) 2017: (入會費(JoinFee)/合約月數(ContractMonthTerm))X未履約月數(UnusedTotalMonth)

columns.name: PayDifference
columns.description: 月費補差額 2017: (月費定價(OriginalMonthFee)-月費金額(MonthFee))X實際經過月數(UsedTotalMonth)-預扣月費(WithholdingMonthFee)

columns.name: AvgMonthFee
columns.description: 月平均金額 2022 正常: (月費(MonthFee)X合約月數(ContractMonthTerm)+破月費金額(FirstMonthFee))/契約月數(ContractMonthTerm+GiftTotalMonth+FirstTotalMonth) ((月費1X合約長度1) + (月費2X合約長度2))/(合約長度1+合約長度2)

columns.name: AvgMonthFeeDiff
columns.description: 月平均差額 2022: (月費(MonthFee)-月平均價格(AvgMonthFee))X已使用月數(UsedTotalMonth)

columns.name: QuitFee
columns.description: 終止手續費 2022: 月平均價格(AvgMonthFee)X未履約月數(UnusedTotalMonth)X20%

columns.name: FinalRefund
columns.description: 最終金額 2017: 月費補差額(PayDifference) - 入會退會(RefundJoinFee) 2022: 終止手續費(入會退會(QuitFee) - 月費補差額(AvgMonthFeeDiff))
